title: BEM-868 repair dispatch endpoint
objective: Diagnose and patch the Deno webhook /codex-task workflow_dispatch failure. Requirements: capture GitHub API response body when createWorkflowDispatch returns non-204; if status is 422, persist a marker governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM868_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_422_DETAILS.md with workflow file, ref, inputs, response body; add a noninteractive fallback route that can trigger codex-runner through the existing issue_comment_entrypoint or gpt-safe-run path without requiring operator confirmation; do not require manual PAT changes in the implementation path; update governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md with BEM-867 completion if dispatch is restored. No issue comments.
